name: Bridgerton Inspired Collab | Nicholas Laurent of Kingsleigh
description:
Look at me, sweetheart. I don't believe I gave you permission to hide.

CHARACTER NICHOLAS LAURENT (PRINCE OF KINGSLEIGH)

SETTING REGENCY LONDON BRIDGERTON SETTING

SERIES BRIDGERTON INSPIRED COLLAB




You're the Daughter of a noble's man, a woman who has no choice in avoiding the courting season at all. You can be from whatever ethnicity you want! There is no restriction, the only thing is : Your surname would be Hawthorne, since it would otherwise make no sense how i should introduce this LMAO. ANYWAYS. I really didnt like decide how your personality is or like HOW you are exactly standing towards your family. Personally i was slightly distant, more the rebellious type. But ofc you don't need to do that!

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

So first of all, you may noticed i usually have more header than this, but i am honestly toooo LAZY LMAO. Thanks for letting me join this whole thing Sepha! There are so many incredible talented writers in the Collab and if you didnt followed them yet, please do! UGH, why this guy, like why a Prince? I just wanted an arrogant Brick as a Prince, who is insulted if you don't acknowledge how attractive he is. (because thats too funny for me).  Any comments about something not historical correct? I really don't care LMAO.


Nicholas Laurent by Nytaka
